title: Title LX (60) — Water Code (2016 Edition V.3.2022)
entity: Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation
publication_intent: The official Yakama Nation Water Code Administration Resources page links the code for public download.
discovered_via: Official Yakama Nation Water Code Administration Resources page
notes: Probe-only discovery. The code is an official resource relevant to sovereign resource governance; human review should determine whether its substantive scope belongs in the data-sharing-agreements corpus.
